abilities.name: Aegis
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Redirect Magic
abilities.text: After an enemy (magic) action targeting this model succeeds, this model may drain a (soulstone) to have another model within 6" suffer the effects of the action instead of this model.

actions.name: Siphon Existence
actions.effects: If the target has a token, this action deals +1 damage.

triggers.name: Siphon Life
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage and this model heals 1.

triggers.name: Transmutation
triggers.text: Remove a token from the target. Then, the target gains a Parasite token.

triggers.name: Drain Magic
triggers.text: Target discards a card. This model may draw a card and then discard a card.

actions.name: Food for the Hive
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: Move the target up to its Sp toward a piece of terrain in its LoS. If the target ends its move in base contact with a Web marker, it is dealt 1 damage.

triggers.name: Transmutation
triggers.text: Remove a token from the target. Then, the target gains a Parasite token.

actions.name: Down to the Last Drop
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Enemy model with a Parasite token only.

triggers.name: Spin Web
triggers.text: Make a Web marker within 1" of the target.
